title: polystichum decompositum
intro: Polystichum decompositum, also known as the Forked Lady Fern or Forked Polystichum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum decompositum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
